title: iberis procumbens subsp. procumbens
intro: Iberis procumbens subsp. procumbens, also known as dwarf candytuft, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to contribute to its potential health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being. While more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness, Iberis procumbens subsp. procumbens has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits and medicinal properties.
